message:
feat(engine): add performance regression gate, expand inline test suites
across bytecode VM, capability, ESM loader, parallel interference gate,
phase gate, static authority analyzer, threshold signing, and tier-up
profiler modules

New module:
- performance_regression_gate.rs: deterministic performance regression
  gate for RGC-703 (bd-1lsy.8.3) — converts benchmark observations into
  fail-closed promotion verdicts with deterministic culprit ranking and
  waiver-expiry enforcement (1472 lines)
- lib.rs: register performance_regression_gate in module tree

Inline test enrichment (adding comprehensive #[cfg(test)] coverage):

- bytecode_vm.rs (+1701 lines): exhaustive Value truthiness/kind tests,
  Instruction opcode_name coverage for all variants, VM execution paths
  including arithmetic, comparisons, jumps, function calls, closures,
  property access, inline cache behavior, GC root tracing, and register
  allocation edge cases

- capability.rs (+319 lines): enum completeness (all 16 capabilities in
  full profile), RuntimeCapability display uniqueness, profile subset/
  superset relationships, capability grant/revoke round-trips, and
  policy profile composition

- esm_loader.rs (+604 lines): module status display/ordering for all
  variants, ExportEntry constructors, import resolution with bare
  specifiers and cycles, module graph determinism, cache invalidation,
  and evaluation ordering

- parallel_interference_gate.rs (+402 lines): witness comparison with
  isolated field mismatches (chunk_count, boundary_repairs, total_tokens,
  hashes), multi-field diff aggregation, and merge reproducibility

- phase_gate.rs (+353 lines): interleaving zero-surface div-by-zero
  edge cases, threshold boundary tests, gate evaluation with zero/
  nonzero thresholds, and phase transition validation

- static_authority_analyzer.rs (+533 lines): BFS topology with all-dead-
  edge exclusion, path-sensitive analysis, cache coherence, and hostcall
  reachability field tests

- threshold_signing.rs (+359 lines): empty preimage ceremony, k=n with
  missing share failure, ceremony ordering determinism, and scope-
  specific threshold validation

- tier_up_profiler.rs (+392 lines): rustfmt formatting fixes and
  additional profiler eligibility edge cases

Other:
- franken_test262_runner.rs: expanded test262 runner with additional
  ES2020 gate coverage (+70 lines)
- performance_statistical_validation.rs: extended validation pipeline
  with additional statistical checks (+403 lines)
- module_compatibility_matrix.rs: minor additions (+4 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
